title: chrysanthemum fontanesii
intro: Chrysanthemum fontanesii, also known as the Korean chrysanthemum or Hanbaekcho, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and soothing digestive issues, due to its flavonoid and polysaccharide content. Chrysanthemum fontanesii is often prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
